form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. First-up favourite; scored a big 6 len win at this track March 12 over 2100m defeating Canencan with 56kg at $1.50. Second run from a spell favourite; won by 0.8 len at this track March 26 over 2000m defeating Brave Champion with 56kg at $1.40. Profiles nicely. Top chance.

form.formComment: At the latest run ran last in a small field at Antalya on April 2 over 2000m, 6 len behind Alone Alone carrying 60kg at $1.25. The race before that 6th of 12 at this track in G1 on March 15 over 2100m, 18 len behind The Protecter carrying 60kg at $10. Can bounce back.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently won by 2.75 len at Antalya April 2 over 2000m defeating Bellicoso with 59kg at $2.40. The run before that 4th of 12 at this track in G1 on March 15 over 2100m, 8 len behind The Protecter with 60kg at $21.40. Impressive win last start and is in the mix again.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last preparation fourth in a small field at this track February 6 over 2000m, 7 len behind Batman Cocugu carrying 59kg at $1.15.
